name: devlingo
description: DevLingo — Duolingo para programadores aprenderem idiomas humanos da carreira dev

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && npm run seed
